title: Creamy Dense Norwegian Lamb Stew
description: A rich and flavorful Norwegian lamb stew featuring fermented ingredients and a unique blend of spices, perfect for a special occasion or date night dinner

ingredients.name: clay pot
ingredients.notes: large enough to hold all ingredients

instructions: Season the lamb cubes with salt and pepper
Heat a large skillet over medium high heat and sear the lamb cubes until browned on all sides
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute
In the clay pot, combine the browned lamb, cooked onion and garlic, cream of tartar, dried thyme, and fermented lamb broth
Cover the clay pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven
Bake for 2 1/2 hours or until the lamb is tender
Stir in the heavy cream and continue to cook for an additional 30 minutes
